projectDescription: A browser console script that automatically types through all TypingClub.com levels, achieving full scores and advancing through lessons autonomously.
keyFeatures: Automatically types all characters in TypingClub lessons via browser console injection
Advances to the next level automatically after completing each lesson
Configurable typing delay (minDelay/maxDelay) to simulate realistic input
Handles special characters including ENTER keys and non-breaking spaces
No installation required — runs directly in the browser developer console
publicApiSurface: autoPlay() — entry point that reads the current level's characters and types them
getTargetCharacters() — extracts the list of characters to type from the DOM
recordKey(chr) — sends a keystroke to the TypingClub internal API
goToNextLevel() — detects and clicks the next-level button after typing completes
minDelay / maxDelay — configurable constants controlling typing speed (ms)
